title: I Lost My Tomboy Friend to a Huge Cock
description: For the longest time, Yuuya's had trouble expressing his interest in Akari. She's just like one of the boys as far he's concerned. Fortunately, he's got a friend that's willing to help set the mood. When he's still unable to take the big step, his friend decides to pick up the slack and treat her right.
author: Ubuo
